body_txt: A staple of '80s culture, Max Headroom was a snarky, faux-CGI television host with a glitchy speech pattern. While not as culturally significant today, he still exists in public consciousness and continues to be referenced and parodied in many works. A Mock Headroom usually appears as a human(oid)'s upper body inside a television screen whose consciousness is inside the TV through either Brain Uploading or Artificial Intelligence . It often has some, if not all of these common features:
